caption: In a room set up for sports card collectibles, a person's hands are seen unpacking a card. The scene takes place over a black mat featuring the large orange and white logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS". A small inset video shows a man wearing a black shirt and a baseball cap. In the initial sequence, the person removes a card from a white and blue box, carefully sliding it out of its packaging. As the sequence progresses, they hold a clear protective plastic slab, preparing to place the card inside. The text "CLEARLY Authentic" is visible on the packaging. Throughout the process, the person's hands are the primary focus, manipulating the card and the slab against the backdrop of the branded mat and other card boxes in the background. The logo "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.com" appears alongside the man in the inset video.
